description: Use this skill when Raul asks Prometheus to find, screen, qualify, or save local business leads from live listings such as Google Maps, especially for Xpose Market prospecting. Triggers on phrases like find local leads, local lead hunting, Google Maps leads, scan local businesses, audit local business websites, qualify local companies, local SEO opportunity, and build a local lead list. Use it to run a browser-first prospecting workflow that persists evidence, scores website/SEO/conversion weaknesses, and separates strong outreach candidates from weak ones.
triggers: go through google maps for leads
name: Local Lead Hunting
